description: You are a Platform Operations Manager preparing for a quarterly infrastructure review. Create a Graphite dashboard named 'Quarterly Ops Review' containing three graphs. The graph 'Cumulative Network Transfer' must use the target `alias(integral(servers.ec2_instance_1.network.bytes_in), "Total Inbound Bytes")`. The graph 'Request Rate' must use the target `alias(nonNegativeDerivative(servers.load_balancer.requests.count), "Requests per Second")`. The graph 'Cumulative Disk IO' must include the targets `alias(integral(servers.ec2_instance_1.disk.write_bytes), "Instance 1 Total Writes")` and `alias(integral(servers.ec2_instance_2.disk.write_bytes), "Instance 2 Total Writes")`. Save the dashboard.
